ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/messaging/v1"> <Header><EnforcementAgentType><EnforcementAgentRegNum>889</EnforcementAgentRegNum><EnforcementAgentName>Деница Йорданова Станчева</EnforcementAgentName></EnforcementAgentType><TransferDate>2024-04-12T10:31:53+03:00</TransferDate><TransferGUID>{e4c95200-e9ec-4795-bddd-62c289899bc6}</TransferGUID></Header><Body><TransferData><IncomingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><OutgoingReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><CasesReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"/><ActionReg xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0010"><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2019-05-04T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>1</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20168890400768</CaseNum><CaseDate>2016-05-27</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>АНКА ДИМИТРОВА АСЕНОВА</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар Съобщение до длъжника за ЗАПОР НА БАНК. С-КИ Връчен в офиса.</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2019-05-04T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>2</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20178890401247</CaseNum><CaseDate>2017-07-07</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>ДИМИТЪР ЛЮБОМИРОВ ХАНДЖИЙСКИ</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар Уведомление Залепен на вратата.</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2019-05-04T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>3</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20178890402025</CaseNum><CaseDate>2017-10-31</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>НАЧАЛНИКА НА РУ НА МВР ГР. ПЕЩЕРА</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар ИСКАНЕ ЗА СЪДЕЙСТВИЕ-ПОЛИЦИЯ Връчен</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/R-0004"><ActionDate>2019-05-04T00:00:00+02:00</ActionDate><ActionNumber>4</ActionNumber><CaseNum>20178890400800</CaseNum><CaseDate>2017-05-19</CaseDate><LiableSubject><Person xmlns="http://issi.transfer.bg/0001"><Name>АТАНАС ЮРИЕВ МИЛЕНОВ</Name><Identifier><EGN/></Identifier><Address/></Person></LiableSubject><ActionTypeID>0</ActionTypeID><Description>връчване призовкар ГПК ПДИ - подробна Залепен на вратата.</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
